loan_payment_date.text: วันที่จ่าย

root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as membername , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_sharestock( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as share_stock , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date ) as approve_date , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_salary( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as memsalary , PKA_LON_REQSRV.fp_calc_install_m_age( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as age_mem ,
sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_loan_card.interest_arrear, sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_calcint_date,
sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.seq_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.ref_loan_doc_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.payment_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_amout, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.principal_balance detail_principal_bala , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.period, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_to,
sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.item_type_code, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.item_type_description || (CASE sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.item_type_code WHEN 'KC' THEN ' ( ' || sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.membership_no || ' )' ELSE '' END) as item_type_description , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.sign_status ,
sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id
, substr(( select sc_fin_ucf_money_retrun.return_desc from sc_com_m_receipt , sc_fin_ucf_money_retrun where sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.ref_loan_doc_no and sc_fin_ucf_money_retrun.return_method = sc_com_m_receipt.deposit_account_no ),5,50) as return_desc
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item, sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_lon_m_contract, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.item_type_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code = 'BF' and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.principal_balance > 0 ) or sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code <> 'BF' ) /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '045883' --and sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date = '07/06/2019'
